creator: josh@tcbug.org
text:
On Monday 05 March 2007 08:10, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of irc/epic4,
>
> Please note that PR ports/109921 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the
> patch and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/109921

Yeah, I approve of the patch.

Edwin, what am I doing that is making it seem like I'm not the 
maintainer of these ports? I'm using the same email address that's 
listed in the MAINTAINER section of the port.

-- 
Thanks,

Josh Paetzel
